filters.name: EVM
filters.definition: Any Ethereum-compatible chain including Ethereum mainnet, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Scroll, Polygon, and any other EVM-compatible L1 or L2

filters.name: Solana
filters.definition: Opportunity specifically related to Solana ecosystem

filters.name: BNB Chain
filters.definition: Opportunity targeting BNB Chain infrastructure, BNB dApps, or BNB ecosystem programs

filters.name: Cosmos
filters.definition: Opportunity within Cosmos ecosystem, IBC, appchains, IBC-connected chains, or Cosmos SDK-based projects

filters.name: Bitcoin
filters.definition: Opportunity related to Bitcoin, Lightning, Ordinals, or L1 or Bitcoin-native L2s

filters.name: Multi-chain
filters.definition: Opportunity spanning multiple different ecosystems, e.g. bridges, omnichain protocols, Layerzero-type projects, or explicitly supporting cross-chain functionality.

filters.name: Other
filters.definition: Any chain or ecosystem, e.g. Cardano, XRP, Aptos, Sui, Tezos, NEAR, Algorand, TON, Flow that are not covered in already defined chain filters

filters.name: DeFi
filters.definition: Decentralised financial protocols including DEXs, lending platforms, yield protocols, stablecoins, liquidity provision, and derivatives

filters.name: Infrastructure
filters.definition: Blockchain-native technical layers including node operators, RPC providers, bridges, indexers, oracles, dev tooling, block explorers, and validators

filters.name: Payments
filters.definition: Crypto-native payment rails, stablecoin payment adoption, merchant crypto payments, and payroll/settlement solutions

filters.name: RWA / Tokenization
filters.definition: Tokenization of real-world assets including commodities, equities, real estate, funds, and structured financial products

filters.name: ZK / Privacy
filters.definition: Opportunity related to zero-knowledge proofs, privacy-preserving infrastructure, or cryptographic systems

filters.name: AI
filters.definition: Opportunity combining blockchain with artificial intelligence, AI agents, or data models. Only tag AI when AI is the core product, not when AI is mentioned incidentally

filters.name: Other
filters.definition: An opportunity that does not fit any already defined sector filters.

filters.name: Infrastructure / RPC / Nodes
filters.definition: Target is seeking node operators, RPC providers, validators, or core blockchain infrastructure providers

filters.name: Data / Oracle / Indexing
filters.definition: Target is seeking data feeds, oracle services, on-chain indexing, or analytics infrastructure

filters.name: Bridge / Cross-chain
filters.definition: Target is seeking cross-chain interoperability solutions, bridge integrations, or omnichain messaging providers

filters.name: DEX / Liquidity
filters.definition: Target is seeking DEX integrations, liquidity providers, AMM partnerships, or market depth solutions

filters.name: Wallet
filters.definition: Target is seeking wallet integrations, wallet SDK partnerships, or in-wallet feature providers

filters.name: ZK / Privacy
filters.definition: Target is seeking zero-knowledge proof tooling, privacy layers, or confidential transaction solutions

filters.name: AI
filters.definition: Target is seeking AI models, AI infrastructure providers, or machine learning data services

filters.name: RWA / Tokenization
filters.definition: Target is seeking tokenization platforms, asset issuance services, or RWA distribution partners

filters.name: Security / Audit
filters.definition: Target is seeking smart contract auditors, security researchers, formal verification services, or compliance tooling

filters.name: Market Maker
filters.definition: Target is seeking market making services, liquidity management, or algorithmic trading partners

filters.name: Launchpad / Token Issuance
filters.definition: Target is seeking token launch support, IDO platforms, or token distribution services

filters.name: Other
filters.definition: Opportunity seeking a service or partner type but does not fit any already defined seeking filters.
